---
title: "Contact"
---

**Quantitative Pharmacology and Systems Modeling Lab**  
Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile  
Faculty of Chemistry and Pharmacy / School of Pharmacy

**Principal Investigator:** Javiera Cortés, PhD  

**Email:** jacortes4@uc.cl  
**LinkedIn:** [Javiera Cortés](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cortesriosj/)  
**GitHub:** [GitHub profile](https://github.com/javiera-cortes-rios)  
**ORCID:** [ORCID](https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0002-1501-8081)
